response.overview: Brie is an ambitious woman who leaves behind her ordinary life to enter the dangerous world of smuggling, driven by the promise of wealth and power. Her rapid rise in the criminal underworld earns her influence, but also attracts powerful enemies.  When two of her closest friends are murdered as a result of her actions, Brie is forced to confront the consequences of her choices. Consumed by guilt, she sets out on a path of revenge against those responsible.  As she takes on dangerous figures within the criminal world, Brie transforms her pain into strength, rising through the ranks and becoming a feared leader.  In a world where loyalty is fragile and power is constantly shifting, Brie must face whether her pursuit of revenge will lead to redemption — or her own downfall.
response.title: Jefa De Jefas
